achievements.description: In Single Race mode, place 1st on the mirror reversed version of Ghost Town 2 using the default race settings with Simulation mode selected
achievements.author: Bl4h8L4hBl4h

achievements.title: Frozen Willed Victory
achievements.description: In Single Race mode, place 1st on the mirror reversed version of Toytanic 2 using the default race settings with Simulation mode selected
achievements.author: Bl4h8L4hBl4h

achievements.title: Locking In
achievements.description: While in 4th place, use a Turbo Battery to reach 1st place without going back a placement or letting it run out
achievements.author: Bl4h8L4hBl4h

achievements.title: Overcharged
achievements.description: Have a Turbo Battery and an Electro Pulse active at the same time

achievements.title: Balls for Everyone!

achievements.title: I Zapped You All!
